title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: David Ondrej presents a tutorial on Pi Agent, a framework for building coding agents. The course covers practical implementation with support for real coding agent development.
writeup: This video is a tutorial on Pi Agent, a framework for building coding agents, presented by David Ondrej in a 30-minute course format. The walkthrough covers practical implementation with support for developing real coding agents. The relevant concepts include AI agents and multi-agent systems.
